notes: v3.6.0: four job-search upgrades from the product review. New Pivot Narrative tab translates your technical background into truthful account-management language (offline guide plus AI line-by-line rewrite), tuned to Microsoft competencies. The Job Tracker now shows real outcomes: response rate, interview rate, offers, and a breakdown by resume variant and by source, so you learn what actually works. A bundled, auto-updating Microsoft data pack (core competencies, culture signals, AM/CSM rubric, interview-loop structure, likely questions) feeds the Pivot tab and a new Microsoft interview-loop card in the Job app. And the Inputs tab now leads with a referral-first prompt, because a referral beats a perfect resume.
